title: Marble's Platinum Mod
description: Introducing a new ore to Minecraft - Platinum! Mine this rare resource and craft conventional tools and weapons to enhance your gameplay. Explore new possibilities with this unique addition to the world of Minecraft.
body:
# Introducing a new ore to Minecraft - Platinum!
Mine this rare resource and craft conventional tools and weapons to enhance your gameplay. Explore new possibilities with this unique addition to the world of Minecraft. These tools are better than iron but still not so strong as diamond ones. You can also create an armor trims using platinum and now its opportunities will only continue to expand...

Mining this ore you can get several raw **platinum nuggets**.

![Platinum Ore ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f8e9bf5703b46846610b6328514193d09b7dfdc_0.webp)

These are not the ones you get from vanilla ingots you should assemble **raw platinum** for the first. 

![Raw platinum Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbe9eba72de258a1ccbdec7044f72bee01649e6.png)

![smithing1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97fcfba0ed0975a354a15395ba3818183e13aea7.png)

![smithing2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6290cebd05b05f1c31ab5621d9ea66db80b8b46f.png)

Then You may use furnace to blast the ore and obtain the **platinum ingot**. Only afterwards you can easily demount it to **platinum nuggets**. They are not the same!

![the biba and the boba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/138a7e37586d2c4ff4730750584ceebfbeb59778.png)

Hope you enjoing this mod, thanks for anything!
